name: Swai (Per Ounce)
description: Choose Flavor of Swai (White Fish) by the ounce.

name: Chicken Meal
description: Follow these steps to build your chicken meals. Choose from chicken breast or thigh Choose a flavor of chicken Choose a carb and adjust carb amount Choose a veggie If you select "DOUBLE CARB SELECTION (NO VEGGIES)" and have selected a veggie, we will default to double carbs no veggies for your meal. (That will be an 8 ounce serving of your selected carb, NO VEGGIES) Leave a special request if needed. We will try to accommodate your request.

name: Ground (Turkey, Chicken, Beef) Meal
description: Please follow these steps to build your meals. Choose from ground beef, or ground turkey Choose a flavor and protein amount Choose a carb and carb amount Choose a veggie If you select "DOUBLE CARB SELECTION (NO VEGGIES)" and have selected a veggie, we will default to double carbs no veggies for your meal. (That will be an 8 ounce serving of your selected carb, NO VEGGIES) Leave a special request if needed. We will try to accommodate your request.

name: Grilled Tri Tip Meal
description: Please follow these steps to build your steak meals. Choose a flavor of our grilled steak Choose the amount of steak you would like Choose a carb and carb amount Choose a veggie If you select "DOUBLE CARB SELECTION (NO VEGGIES)" and have selected a veggie, we will default to double carbs no veggies for your meal. (That will be an 8 ounce serving of your selected carb, NO VEGGIES) Leave a special request if needed. We will try to accommodate your request.

name: Breakfast Bowl
description: Follow these steps to build your breakfast bowl Choose your egg style Choose your sausage Choose your carbs Add some toppings Leave a special request, if needed. We will try to accommodate your request.

name: Pancake or Waffle Breakfast
description: Do you want just our amazing protein waffles / pancakes with no eggs and just sausage? Well here you go! Choose between 2 or 3 protein waffles / pancakes Choose between pork or turkey sausages (3 come with the meal) The meal comes with syrup Leave a special request (if needed). we will try to accommodate your request.

name: Seafood (Salmon, Shrimp, Swai) Meal
description: Please follow these steps to build your seafood meal. Choose from Salmon, Shrimp, or Swai (White Fish) Choose a flavor and amount of protein Choose a carb and adjust carb amount Choose a veggie If you select "DOUBLE CARB SELECTION (NO VEGGIES)" and have selected a veggie, we will default to double carbs/no veggies for your meal. (That will be an 8 ounce serving of your selected carb, NO VEGGIES) Leave a special request (if needed). We will try to accommodate your request.

name: Meatball (Turkey, Chicken) Meal
description: Please follow these steps to build your meals. Choose a flavor of turkey meatball. Choose an number of meatballs (each meatball is about 2 ounces) Choose a carb and adjust carb amount Choose a veggie If you select "DOUBLE CARB SELECTION (NO VEGGIES)" and have selected a veggie, we will default to double carbs/no veggies for your meal. (That will be an 8 ounce serving of your selected carb, NO VEGGIES) Leave a special request (if needed). We will try to accommodate your request.

name: Chicken Breast (Per Ounce)
description: Choose a flavor of chicken breast by the ounce!

name: Plant-Based Nugget or Plant-Based Meatball Meal
description: Follow these steps to build your plant-based nugget or meatball meal. Choose between nuggets or meatballs Choose the amount of nuggets or meatballs. (1 Ounce = 1 nugget or 1 meatball) Choose a carb and carb amount Choose a veggie If you select "DOUBLE CARB SELECTION (NO VEGGIES)" and have selected a veggie, we will default to double carbs no veggies for your meal. (That will be an 8 ounce serving of your selected carb, NO VEGGIES) Leave a special request, if needed. We will try to accommodate requests

name: 5 Steak & 5 Chicken Meals
description: Want meals for 5 days? Grab a 10 meal stack and save! Level up with 5 breakfast to have your three daily meals covered for up to 5 days. Follow these steps to build your 10 meals. Our Preppers will only use the selections you chose, but they may be assembled randomly. Choose protein flavors Choose your carbs (All carbs are a 4oz serving) Choose your veggies. (All veggies are a 1 cup serving) If you would like a specifically customized meal combination, please specify in the the notes upon checkout.

name: Hardbody Challenge Female Meal Creator
description: These meal options are specifically for Female Athletes doing The Camp Hardbody FTDI challenge. Choose your protein. Choose a protein flavor. Choose a carb. Choose a Vegetable. Select your Camp drop off location. If ordering multiple meals make sure all locations match. Optional Add a Discounted LeanFeast Insulated Tote bag to one of the meals you build, and we will put your whole order in it. (The tote bag holds up to 10 meals)

name: Bulk Veggies (Per Cup)
description: Choose a veggie by the cup.

name: 6 Week FTDI Challenge 10 Pack Female
description: This Pack is for Female Athletes Following The Camp 6 Week FTDI Challenge. Please follow the steps to build your pack. There will be 4 ounces of protein, 2oz of carb, and 1 cup of vegetable in each meal. We will only use the selections you have made. Choose your pack variation. Choose your protein flavors. Choose your carbs. Choose your Vegetables. All protein flavors, vegetables and carb options selected will be chefs choice. If you would like a more customized meals, please specify in the notes upon checkout. Please select your Camp Drop off location.
